overall.description: A cinematic game engine scene from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a vibrant night market food stall. The camera orbits around a vendor cooking noodles, revealing tattooed customers eating at a counter amid neon-lit cyberpunk surroundings.

scene_state.functional_zone: night market food stall cooking area

events.description: steam from cooking becomes more prominent as vendor tosses ingredients in wok

agents.ego_description: standing behind the food vendor watching them cook noodles in a steaming wok

notable_agents.action: vendor is actively stir-frying noodles in a large wok with steam rising

entered.detail: metal counter with three piles of fried noodles under a warming light
large metal wok emitting steam as vendor cooks
purple neon sign with text visible above market entrance
row of circular lights under the covered market roof
bright red vending machine with glowing interface

segments.scene_description: The scene opens behind a food vendor in a cyberpunk night market. The vendor is cooking noodles in a steaming wok at a metal counter, while neon signs glow in the background. Steam rises from the cooking area as the vendor works.

events.description: camera begins orbiting around the food stall to reveal the customer seating area
more customers become visible sitting at the counter eating

agents.ego_description: moving around the food stall to observe customers eating at the counter

notable_agents.action: tattooed customer sitting on green stool eating noodles with chopsticks
customer in white shirt sitting at counter eating noodles

entered.detail: green plastic stools for customer seating along the counter
glowing blue digital display showing menu items

segments.scene_description: The camera orbits right around the stall, revealing customers seated on green stools at the counter. A tattooed woman and another customer are eating noodles while steam continues to rise from the cooking area now visible to the left.

events.description: camera slows down and focuses on the tattooed customer eating noodles

agents.ego_description: closely observing a tattooed customer eating noodles, with the vendor still cooking in the background

notable_agents.action: heavily tattooed woman eating noodles and occasionally looking around

entered.detail: thick steam clouds rising from the active cooking area

segments.scene_description: The camera slows to focus on the tattooed customer eating at the counter, showing detailed tattoos on her arms. Steam continues to rise from the cooking wok in the background as other customers eat nearby.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous orbital camera movement that shifts from the frantic activity of a food vendor to an intimate focus on a customer in a neon-lit night market. It begins behind a vendor cooking noodles in a steaming wok at a metal counter, with vibrant neon signs glowing in the background. As the camera orbits to the right, the perspective expands to reveal customers seated on green stools, while the cooking area and rising steam shift toward the left of the frame. The movement then slows and tightens its focus on a woman eating at the counter, highlighting the detailed tattoos on her arms. Finally, the scene settles on this close-up interaction while the ambient steam and other diners remain visible in the soft-focus background.
